title: test_session helper: 'account1' and empty accounts map are unexplained
description: In methods_test.rs, test_session() hardcodes 'account1' in primaryAccounts but leaves accounts as {}. There is no comment explaining: (1) that 'account1' must match the fixture files; (2) that accounts is empty by design — the tests only exercise chat_account_id(), not chat_capability(); (3) that a test calling chat_capability() on this session would silently get Ok(None). A contributor writing a new test that needs capability data will be confused by the mismatch between primaryAccounts having 'account1' and accounts having no such key.
